displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: The Sith War #4: Jedi Holocaust
synopsis: Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4 is the fourth issue in the Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War series of comics. It was published on November 1, 1995 by Dark Horse Comics.
title: Tales of the Jedi: The Sith War #4: Jedi Holocaust
